groups.name: camunda.process-test.similarity
groups.description: Configuration for semantic similarity assertions in agentic process tests.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.similarity.embedding-model
groups.description: Configuration for the embedding model used for semantic similarity.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.similarity.embedding-model.credentials
groups.description: AWS credentials for the Amazon Bedrock embedding model provider.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.similarity.preprocessors
groups.description: Configuration for the text pre-processing pipeline applied before computing embedding vectors.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.judge
groups.description: Configuration for the AI judge used in agentic process test assertions.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.judge.chat-model
groups.description: Configuration for the chat model used by the AI judge.

groups.name: camunda.process-test.judge.chat-model.credentials
groups.description: AWS credentials for the Amazon Bedrock chat model provider.

values.description: Use OpenAI embedding models (requires api-key and model).
Use Amazon Bedrock embedding models (requires model; optionally credentials or api-key).
Use Azure OpenAI embedding models (requires endpoint, api-key, and model).
Use an OpenAI-compatible embedding API (requires base-url and model).

Use Anthropic models (requires api-key and model).

Use an OpenAI-compatible API (requires base-url and model).
